---
toc: false 
---

# <span style="color: #022044; display: block; text-align: center;text-decoration: underline;">About Me<span/>

```{=html}
<img src="pictures/paris-stroud-headshot-2024.jpeg"
     alt="Headshot" 
     width="400" 
     style="display:inline-block; float: left; margin:0 30px 10px 0; border: 8px solid #2F0407; border-radius: 15px;">
```

Paris Stroud, MPH, WELL AP is a public health and sustainability professional based in Atlanta, GA. She’s passionate about creating healthier communities and smarter, more sustainable spaces. Paris leads research projects, develops data dashboards, and works with organizations to turn complex health and sustainability data into actionable insights.\

A WELL Accredited Professional, she brings people-first thinking to the built environment, mentoring teams and sharing findings at conferences and community events. Her work sits at the intersection of public health, sustainability, and community impact, helping organizations and communities make healthier, smarter choices.\

Outside of work, Paris enjoys diving into thriller novels, binge-watching sitcoms, and spending time with her two dogs.
